problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
hypothesis: The key to What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? is Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells — specifically Telomerase activation/inhibition in — which would help 1,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
